title: centaurea carthalinica
intro: Centaurea carthalinica, also known as Centaury or Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and bitter-tasting leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Centaurea carthalinica include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps. Centaury can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to calm digestive upset and promote relaxation, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
